positive: A whimsical, stylized forest creature, a fox-like being with exaggerated, elegant curves and a flowing, ethereal tail. The creature is depicted in a dramatic, high-contrast silhouette against a stylized, pastel gradient background of deep midnight blue merging into soft sage green. Minimalist composition with bold line work and clean shapes, reminiscent of Art Nouveau stained glass and mid-century graphic design. The focus is on the creature's profile, showcasing delicate fur textures and geometric patterns integrated into its clothing or accessories. Perfect for a screen print on clothing, clean edges, vibrant flat colors, vector style illustration. Highly detailed, centered, vertical focus, high resolution.
